code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  let len = list.len(nums)
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut a = 0
  while a < len
    if not found
      mut b = a + 1
      while b < len
        if not found
          let xa = match list.get(nums, a)
          when Some(v)
            v
          when None
            0
          end
          let xb = match list.get(nums, b)
          when Some(v)
            v
          when None
            0
          end
          if xa + xb == target
            found = true
            fi = a
            fj = b
          end
        end
        b = b + 1
      end
    end
    a = a + 1
  end

  if found
    print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
end
